product_description: Reflex is an adaptive and game-based online system designed to help students in grades 2 and up master basic math facts (addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division) with fluency and confidence.

vendor_resources.text: Discover ExploreLearning's Classroom Accessibility Features - Reflex
vendor_resources.justification: This page explicitly lists several accessibility features of Reflex, including visual design, keyboard controls, closed captioning, optional audio/music, and factoring out keyboard entry speed.

vendor_resources.text: How Reflex Empowers Special Education Students
vendor_resources.justification: This article details how Reflex supports special education students, mentioning features like factoring out keyboard input speed and multilingual support.
